# Complex queries

Multiple query blocks per page — verifies independent rendering, fold state, and ordering.

## High-priority open work

```tasks
not done
priority above medium
group by folder
sort by due
limit 10
```

## Anything due this week

```tasks
not done
due before 2026-05-18
sort by due
hide priority
hide tags
```

## Personal recurring items

```tasks
is recurring
path includes personal
group by recurrence
```

## Recently completed work

```tasks
done
path includes work
sort by done reverse
limit 5
hide priority
hide tags
hide created date
```
